cn:
**投资组合日报 | 2026年5月26日**

美股科技股普遍承压，英伟达跌2.5%，特斯拉、谷歌涨幅有限。拼多多逆势上扬2.5%，显示相对韧性。A股主力股表现分化，新易盛劲升6.7%（7日涨14.7%），但医药板块集体疲软。港股生物医药持续下行，北海康成暴跌8.7%，开拓药业跌5.7%，嘉和生物累跌超20%。整体情绪偏弱，小盘生物医药风险加剧。
en:
**Portfolio Brief | 26 May 2026**

US tech under pressure: Nvidia -2.5%, Tesla and Google flat. PDD outperforms +2.5%. Mainland China equities mixed—New Easun surges 6.7% (up 14.7% weekly), but biotech broadly wounded. Hong Kong biotech in freefall: Luokung Tech -8.7%, Luokung Pharma -5.7%, China Kanghui down over 20% weekly. Micro-cap pharma showing stress. Sentiment deteriorating across the board.
